name: Kanye West

acts.description: Series of explicit anti-Semitic statements in 2022, including 'I like Hitler' and 'I love Nazis' on Alex Jones show
Wearing 'White Lives Matter' shirt at Paris Fashion Week; history of erratic and threatening statements toward Black public figures

behavior_summary: One of the most important musicians of the 21st century said 'I like Hitler' on national television. He has a diagnosed mental illness, which complicates the picture without excusing the words.

art.summary: Arguably the most influential musician of the 2000s. Transformed hip-hop production. 808s invented a genre. His artistic ambition and formal innovation are unquestioned.

accountability_events: 2022 dropped by Adidas, Gap, Balenciaga following antisemitic remarks

verdict.blurb: He made some of the most thrilling albums of the century and then said he liked Hitler on camera. The mental health context is real and doesn't make the antisemitism evaporate. Streaming his music puts money in his pocket. He knows what he said.
